title: Nelson emails ignored my issues
content:
Nelson emails ignored my issues

Mj, CFO, works remote and called into all meetings until suddenly i was remote and meetings were no longer allowed to be zoomed into.

Stomach issues are being ignored, as well as all my fundamental disability complaints.

Id like to be made aware of the process in which the meetins i was not involved in and what happened during them and the process for the decision making.

There is also discrimination on part of the independent contractor, stating that our documentation and healthcare provider was not an official MD, hwoeber, this healthcare proivder has been with me for nearly a decade and is the best person to help with my issues.

The accommodations fundamentally ignore my disabiltiy. This ties back to Nelson’s email. On my first day returning to the office, i was reprimanded for using my phone for my disability for calming effects. this shows that my disability is not being paid attention to and ignored.

my contract does not specify location, time place work needs to be completed legally.
context: From document: Nelson emails ignored my issues — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
